title: KidSTART
text:
KidSTART - SupportGoWhere
KidSTART
Share link
Supports pregnant mothers and low-income families in early childhood development, to build strong foundations for children aged 6 and below.
SERVICE HIGHLIGHTS
Home-based
Free
Referral required
SERVICE PROVIDERS
Find service providers near you
Collapse all sections
About this support

KidSTART Singapore Limited is a non-profit organisation and an Institution of a Public Character that specialises in supporting families in early childhood development.

Our specialist team partners with the government and community to empower low-income families in building strong foundations for their children, giving them a good start in life.

Who is this for?

You are eligible for our services if your family meets these criteria:

You have a pregnant mother and/or a child who is a Singapore Citizen and aged 6 and below

You have a monthly household income of $2,500 and below or monthly household income per capita of $650 and below

Is staying in the following areas:

Ang Mo Kio/Yishun

Bedok/Geylang Serai

Choa Chu Kang/Bukit Panjang/Bukit Batok

Hougang/Serangoon

Jalan Besar/Toa Payoh

Kreta Ayer/Bukit Merah

Punggol/Sengkang

Taman Jurong/Boon Lay

Woodlands/Sembawang

Learn more about this service and how it can help you

What to expect?

Children achieve age-appropriate child development outcomes

Children receive up-to-date immunisations

Parent-child interactions and family functioning improve

Children enrol early into preschool and achieve regular attendance

How to apply?

Fill up the application form to sign up as a KidSTART Family.

Information last updated on 06 Mar 2026
